first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively identical. Both evaluations correctly identify the same key strengths (AI-agent work, high-throughput experience) and the same primary concerns (lack of Python, limited evidence of staff-level strategic scope). The minor variations in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any reaction to the redaction of the candidate's name and personal contact information.
